creator: gnikl@justmail.de
text:
(In reply to Daniel Engberg from comment #19)
My reference to freetype2 was merely another example where a build system change had unexpected consequences. It was not meant to belittle your work. I am sorry I sounded like that!

> if you read the PR referred to that commit there's a discussion about this,
> short version is we need to move on and not rely on deprecated functionality
> which will cause issues further down the road.
I am not opposing replacing deprecated functionality. Making sure that no port relies on such functionality is fine, but you should take "external" uses into account as well. IMHO keeping functionality is a courtesy to users. I understand that maintaining a port is time-consuming.
